query:
-- Amit Bhargava: all territories, PAL+BESS lanes
-- The isPalBessRep gate runs palBessOpportunityGate instead of portableAirOpportunityGate
-- So we look at productLane = bess, pal, NULL (unclassified) — NOT portable_air-only or pumps-only
SELECT 'Amit' AS rep, p.id, p.name, p.projectState, p.priority, p.productLane, p.sector, p.value,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 END) AS sendReadyCount
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.suppressed = 0 AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active' AND p.priority = 'hot'
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY 
  CASE WHEN p.productLane IN ('bess','pal') THEN 0
       WHEN p.productLane IN ('multi_lane_pt','NULL') OR p.productLane IS NULL THEN 1
       ELSE 2 END,
  sendReadyCount DESC, p.value DESC
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
-- Amit Bhargava: all territories, PAL+BESS lanes
-- The isPalBessRep gate runs palBessOpportunityGate instead of portableAirOpportunityGate
-- So we look at productLane = bess, pal, NULL (unclassified) — NOT portable_air-only or pumps-only
SELECT 'Amit' AS rep, p.id, p.name, p.projectState, p.priority, p.productLane, p.sector, p.value,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 END) AS sendReadyCount
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.suppressed = 0 AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active' AND p.priority = 'hot'
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY 
  CASE WHEN p.productLane IN ('bess','pal') THEN 0
       WHEN p.productLane IN ('multi_lane_pt','NULL') OR p.productLane IS NULL THEN 1
       ELSE 2 END,
  sendReadyCount DESC, p.value DESC
LIMIT 10;
